title: polystichum auriculatum
intro: Polystichum auriculatum, also known as auriculated lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum auriculatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and stress. Polystichum auriculatum is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be found in capsule or tincture form in some herbal supplements.
